title: stelis tortuosa
intro: Stelis tortuosa, also known as the twisted stelis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis and is native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis tortuosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Stelis tortuosa is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
